title: Filipino-Style Stir-Fried Tempeh
description: A quick and easy stir-fry dish from the Philippines, featuring crispy tempeh, crunchy vegetables, and a savory sauce.

ingredients.name: oil
ingredients.notes: such as vegetable or peanut oil

instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add tempeh and cook until crispy, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove tempeh from the wok and set aside.
Add onion, garlic, and bell pepper to the wok and cook until the vegetables are tender-crisp.
Add bitter melon and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Return tempeh to the wok and stir in soy sauce, oyster sauce (if using), and black pepper.
Serve immediately over steamed rice or noodles.
Garnish with chopped green onions and a sprinkle of black pepper, if desired.
